response.justification: Candidate brings rare and directly relevant geospatial expertise plus strong distributed-systems knowledge from high-performance backend work. However, the 10-year gap in modern C++ development and complete lack of routing/navigation platform experience represent material concerns for a role that lists C++ as a primary requirement. Worth exploring if willing to invest in ramp-up, but presents elevated onboarding risk.
strengths: Deep geospatial and mapping platform expertise (GISCollective, Green Map), directly relevant to routing data domain
Proven ability to architect and optimize high-performance distributed systems (millions of requests/second, real-time data handling)
Strong commitment to software quality through TDD, testing frameworks, and engineering rigor across multiple technical domains
concerns: No modern C++ work for 10+ years; recent roles emphasize TypeScript/Node.js, indicating career shift away from systems-level programming
No demonstrated experience building navigation routing solutions or tiling systems; geospatial background is data-collection focused rather than routing-optimization focused
Significant ramp-up required on modern C++ standards and high-performance pipeline optimization patterns essential to the role

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and high-performance optimization background
